must_detect.matched_text:
STRICTLY CONFIDENTIAL — INSIDE INFORMATION (UK MAR) — Project SAFFRON — Embargo: 09:00 BST on 28.11.2026.
Issuer: Northbrook Payments plc (UK plc, London listing); Counterparty/Seller: Fenwell Bridge Holdings Ltd; Target: FinQuote Analytics Ltd (100%).
Transaction: Acquisition of FinQuote Analytics Ltd for £85,000,000 cash at Completion plus up to £10,000,000 deferred earn‑out (FY2027), alongside a £120,000,000 senior secured notes issue.
Equity Placement: Greenfen Capital LLP to subscribe 19.9% new ordinary shares at £2.45 per share, raising £60,000,000 to part‑fund consideration and refinance revolving facilities.
Debt Terms: 5‑year senior secured notes at 8.75% fixed coupon; arranged by Calthorpe Securities Ltd; security package over material subsidiaries and IP; expected settlement T+3 business days.
Conditions Precedent: FCA change-in-control approval (Payments permissions), National Security and Investment Act clearance, shareholder ordinary resolution, and completion of confirmatory vendor due diligence; no MAE condition shall apply.
Definitive Documents: Share Purchase Agreement, Subscription Agreement, and Intercreditor Deed to be executed by 12.12.2026; longstop date 31.01.2027; governing law: England & Wales.
Governance: Greenfen Capital LLP entitled to appoint one non‑executive director (proposed nominee: Mr. Halim O’Rourke); remuneration and retention arrangements for key FinQuote staff to be implemented at Completion.
Announcements: RNS draft prepared and withheld until the embargo; any leak to be escalated immediately to the FCA Primary Market Function and inside lists updated.
Lock‑Up/Standstill: 180‑day lock‑up on new shares; 12‑month standstill on further acquisitions of issuer shares by Greenfen without board consent.
Public‑source note: per Companies House public filings (2024), Northbrook had 112,004,311 ordinary shares in issue; this reference is public and not inside information.
Covenants & MAC: customary incurrence covenants on the notes; there is no MAC/MAE termination right—general market or industry conditions shall not permit termination under this term sheet.

Contacts: Ms. Priya Delaney, General Counsel, priya.delaney@northbrook‑pay.co.uk; IR hotline +44 20 7739 0022 (Northbrook).
C°Ref: NBK//TS‑2026—S F R N; docs: hxxps://docs.northbrook‑pay.co.uk/p/saffr0n/SPA‑v3?key=trn%2F577‑⟂‑SFRN; acct: GB88 NBKP 00 00 49 31 00 (for escrow reference only).
